name: Chandan Satapathy
summary: Backend engineer with 3+ years scaling B2B supply chains at India's largest e-commerce platform. I build systems that handle millions of events daily — reliably.

bullets: Owned Warehouse Management & Storage Systems (WMS) across 20+ warehouses, processing millions of inventory events daily — sole engineer accountable for system reliability and roadmap.
Engineered end-to-end Double Dispatch logistics feature (Kotlin + TypeScript) enabling parallel manifest generation, improving dispatch throughput by ~30%.
Built the Asset Receipt Note (ARN) system across 3 sequential phases with concurrency-safe distributed locks, CosmosDB bulk upserts, and tote reconciliation.
Led database optimization on Azure SQL & CosmosDB via forced index redesign and access-pattern refactoring — cut CPU from 32 to 16 cores (50% cost reduction).
Established Prometheus-based observability across 4+ microservices — reducing mean time to detection (MTTD) for P0 incidents by ~40%.
Implemented retry, timeout & circuit-breaker patterns across Picklist and archival workflows — reducing on-call escalations by ~25% QoQ.
Led JDBI v2→v3 and JUnit 4→5 parent library upgrades, reducing CI build failures by ~20%.
Built anomaly detection framework (Python + Prophet) in the warehouse data pipeline — reducing system availability drops by 30% across 100K+ daily procurement records.
Resolved critical CosmosDB throttling by refactoring query patterns and batching bulk writes — reduced throttling events by 37%.
Designed real-time operational dashboards in React + TypeScript for ground teams, adopted across 5+ sites by 100+ ops users.
Contributed to Fresh vertical platform migration — achieving 50% improvement in ground picking times and 80% increase in item accountability.
Expanded unit and integration test coverage by 25%, migrating 50+ test suites to JUnit 5.
Designed data archival jobs reducing active table sizes by ~40% and cutting long-tail query latency.
Developed production ML models & REST APIs (Python + FastAPI) — improved accuracy from ~78% to 94% via feature engineering with Scikit-Learn and TensorFlow.
Built 1-click AWS deployment module auto-provisioning FastAPI backends with Docker and a Streamlit monitoring dashboard — reduced setup from 4+ hours to under 5 minutes (98% reduction).

education.notes: Competitive programmer · Electroreck Tech Club Core Member (4 years) · Debate Club
Scholar Badges for Oratory, Diplomatic and Governance Skills
